positive: A majestic minimalist representation of a deep night sky meeting a stylized forest canopy. Central composition, featuring intertwined silhouettes of abstract celestial bodies (moons, nebulae patterns) and various exotic foliage shapes (eucalyptus, ferns). Strong contrast between deep indigo and sapphire blues and luminous gold/pale turquoise accents. Use graphic lines and negative space to create depth. The style should be illustrative, highly symmetrical, and reminiscent of sophisticated zentangle mandalas mixed with Art Nouveau botanicals. Ideal for apparel printing, clean edges, high contrast.
